auth.welcomeBody: A free, private mediator for the two of you: protected time to speak, tools for hard seasons, and a path back to each other.
auth.checkEmail: Check your email to confirm your account, then sign in.
auth.authError: That didn't work. Check your email and password.
auth.localOnly: Using Mend without an account. Everything stays on this phone.

settings.title: Settings
settings.languageNote: Guides, card decks, and session content are English-only for now. Translations are on the way.
settings.aboutBody: Mend is an educational tool, not therapy. It cannot replace a licensed marriage and family therapist, and it never diagnoses. If there is violence, fear, or control in your relationship, guided couple conversations are not the safe tool. Free, private, and built to be deleted.

journey.title: Your journey
journey.subtitle: A staged path from where you are to a marriage that doesn't need this app.
journey.designedToEnd: Mend is designed to be deleted: the goal is a marriage that doesn't need it anymore.
